name: restaurant payroll managers processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For restaurant payroll managers processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual data entry causes inaccurate labor cost reports. We automate labor cost reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and time clock systems.
problem_solved: Inaccurate labor cost reporting due to manual data entry errors.
features: manual data import from time clock systems
